items.content: Open task assigned to you: "Agent memory: persistent context across sessions" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d3119de0). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. Each agent stores key learnings in ai:memory objects. Loaded into context on each run.

Open task assigned to you: "Widget system: reusable components from @class definitions" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311b5f6). Priority: P1. Pick it up and work on it. Feed, Grid, Form are all widgets. Widget config stored as elementStore objects. Any class can be rendered by any widget.

Open task assigned to you: "Agent dialog: Feed tab with agent's conversation history" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d30f277f). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. Agent modal has tabs: Prompt, Feed (filtered messages for this agent), Tasks, Workers. Feed tab reuses feed widget filtered by agent_id.

Open task assigned to you: "Per-class card templates stored in elementStore" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311bde8). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. Each @class has a 'card_template' prop defining how it renders in feeds/grids. HTML template with {{prop}} substitution.

Open task assigned to you: "All elements: activity indicator on new messages" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d30f2410). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. When new WS event arrives for an element type, show a pulse/blink on that section to draw attention.

Open task assigned to you: "Element vs Object: visual binding for all classes" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311587d). Priority: P1. Pick it up and work on it. Every element has a visual representation. Define how classes declare their visual (card template, form layout, grid columns). Store as @class props.

Open task assigned to you: "Free tier demo tenant" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d31175cd). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. Pre-loaded demo tenant on arc3d.ai with sample architect designs, agent conversations, example classes.

Open task assigned to you: "Conversation view: threaded messages per conversation" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311c393). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. Click conversation to see full thread. Messages ordered by created. Inline reply. Like email thread or Slack thread.

Open task assigned to you: "Real-time agent status indicators" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311cc21). Priority: P1. Pick it up and work on it. Green pulse on active agents. Red dot on errors. Gray on idle. Show on agent cards + worker panel.

Open task assigned to you: "Projects view on dashboard" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311c30f). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. Load @project objects from platform_root registry. Show project cards with task counts, status, git branch.

Open task assigned to you: "Production docker-compose.prod.yml with all services" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311cfeb). Priority: P1. Pick it up and work on it. Complete compose: ES PHP, CouchDB, WS, Auth, Nginx, Architect. Environment variables from .env. Health checks.

Open task assigned to you: "Automated backup: CouchDB + Auth SQLite" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311d02c). Priority: P1. Pick it up and work on it. Cron job: daily backup of CouchDB databases + auth.db. Compress, upload to S3 or git.

Open task assigned to you: "Monitoring: health dashboard for production" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311d79b). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. Simple status page showing all services health, response times, disk usage, container status.

Open task assigned to you: "Event system: wire @event triggers on CRUD operations" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311eeea). Priority: P1. Pick it up and work on it. Before/after create/update/delete events fire registered @event handlers. Server-side + client-side.

Open task assigned to you: "CI/CD pipeline: auto-deploy on git push" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311e64e). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. GitLab CI: build images → push to registry → deploy on production server.
Open task assigned to you: "Terms of service for arc3d.ai" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d312272c). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. ToS for the hosted platform. Data ownership, privacy, SLA.

Open task assigned to you: "Genesis versioning: track changes to class definitions" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311fdf0). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. When a class is modified, store the previous version. Enable rollback. Diff between versions.

Open task assigned to you: "Composite storage: test read fallback + merge strategies" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311e890). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. Verify composite storage works: read from local cache first, fallback to remote API. Merge strategy for multi-source.

Open task assigned to you: "SQL storage provider: PostgreSQL/MySQL backend" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d311f166). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. IStorageProvider for SQL databases. One table per class. Auto-migrate schema from @class props.

Open task assigned to you: "MCP server: test and document elementStore as Claude plugin" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d3120d18). Priority: P2. Pick it up and work on it. Verify es-mcp-server works. Document how to add elementStore as MCP server in Claude settings.

Open task assigned to you: "PLAN-001: HiveMind AIC Adaptation" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d35d9b2a). Priority: P1. Pick it up and work on it. Adapt 6 HiveMind multi-agent patterns into AIC: F3 stuck detection, F1 DAG planning, F2 typed artifacts, F5 self-critique, F4 context budget, F6 memory agent. ~3 weeks total.

Open task assigned to you: "PLAN-003: ElementStore Client Packages" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d35db2d2). Priority: P1. Pick it up and work on it. Create focused ES client packages: UI widgets client, CLI client, JSON client, REST API client. Each with docs and examples.

Open task assigned to you: "PLAN-002: Multi-Tenant Critical Path" (5d9d59b9b534bd18d03f3b13d35da576). Priority: P0. Pick it up and work on it. FT-001 tenant class → FT-002 storage routing → FT-004 auth JWT → FT-005 prod compose → FT-006 server provision. Foundation for arc3d.ai SaaS.

items.name: M9 Staging Health Check + Auth DB Safety
items.description:
Full installation check of arc3d.dev.agura.tech on staging.agura.tech.

1. Verify all services running and healthy on staging
2. Investigate auth-service DB reset - find root cause
3. Locate volume where passwords/credentials are stored
4. Move auth-service DB volume to external persistent storage on server
5. Add do-not-touch protection so volume survives container redeploy

Background: auth-service DB was reset unexpectedly - likely docker volume recreated. Need to ensure credentials survive container rebuilds.
